---
title: "I want to get started with AI"
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: getting-started-guidance
    contents: guidance/posts
    type: default
    include:
      categories: "*workflow*"
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: getting-started-tools
    contents: tools/posts
    type: grid
    include:
      categories: "*setup*"
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    grid-columns: 2
  - id: getting-started-casestudies
    contents: casestudies/posts
    type: default
    include:
      categories: "*workflow*"
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

::: {.story-hero}
This pathway brings together content tagged for **workflow**, **guidance**, and **setup** so a new reader can move from principles to practice.
:::

## Guidance to read first

:::{#getting-started-guidance}
:::

## Tools to help you begin

:::{#getting-started-tools}
:::

## Case studies to compare against

:::{#getting-started-casestudies}
:::

[Back to the homepage](index.qmd)
